name: Coconut Crunch Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the filling ingredients and pour into an uncooked 9-inch crust that has been sprinkled with coconut.
2. Mix the topping ingredients: combine flour, brown sugar, and cinnamon, then mix in butter, followed by shredded coconut and chopped walnuts until evenly distributed over the pie.
3. Bake the pie at 400°F for 40-45 minutes.
4. Allow to cool before cutting.
